sessionStart.comment: Inject options-mode rules text into the session via additionalContext when the flag is on (Copilot CLI 1.0.11+).

agentStop.comment: Enforcement: read transcriptPath from stdin (events.jsonl), walk backward to the latest assistant.message, and deny the stop unless data.content contains the CommonMark reference-link sentinel `[//]: # (options-mode-no-question)` (hidden by markdown renderers) or data.toolRequests contains an ask_user call. Loop-counter give-up after 5 consecutive blocks matches hooks/stop.js.

preToolUse.comment: v0.12.0 stdin-logging probe only - emits {} (pass-through). Logs preToolUse stdin keys + raw JSON to ~/.copilot/options-mode.log so we can confirm whether sessionId and shell command args are present, then decide on the hybrid+intercept toggle path for Issue B.
